summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No shared canonical exists. Close, merge, fix, and raise-PR paths are not permitted by this job. All open seed PRs are useful or potentially useful work that requires maintainer or technical correctness judgment before any mutating action; the one hydrated security-sensitive linked issue is routed to central security handling only.

actions.reason: Focused bug/provider-capability PR with failed proof and technical correctness judgment required.
Broad UI/session-state feature requires maintainer product and technical review; not eligible for close or autonomous fix in this job.
Useful focused bug fix with maintainer rebase signal; requires maintainer/technical finalization outside this close-only inventory job.
Focused provider compatibility fix appears viable but requires technical correctness review; no merge/fix action allowed.
Potentially useful but failing checks and proof; product/API correctness and repair decision require maintainer judgment, and fix is not allowed.
Focused bug fix with proof now present; final correctness/merge decision requires maintainer review.
Partial broad i18n feature with conflicts/failing checks and product-language review requirements; no close/fix/merge allowed.
Useful focused compatibility fix with maintainer rebase signal and failing check; requires author/maintainer follow-up, not closure.
Focused useful fix with apparent author follow-up and green checks; maintainer technical review is required before any merge/close path.
Useful focused bug fix with proof-policy/technical acceptance decision still requiring maintainer judgment.
Related source issue should remain open; candidate PR #82514 is only partial and not merge-ready.
